reviews.comment:
Un lugar hermoso para descansar o pasar el día en familia. Súper tranquilo y cómodo. Los precios son accesibles. El baño está impecablemente reluciente

(Translated by Google)
A beautiful place to relax or spend the day with family. Super quiet and comfortable. The prices are affordable. The bathroom is spotless.

reviews.comment:
La verdad que asqueroso los baños, dejan mucho q decir de la institución por todo lo q cobran mensualmente de la cuota es para que al menos estén limpios y ni alcohol tienen en los baños aparte se rebalsan los inodoros una vergüenza

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are disgusting, they reflect very poorly on the institution. For all the monthly tuition they charge, they should at least be clean, and they don't even have hand sanitizer. Plus, the toilets overflow. It's a disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLNVBpZER3EAE
